title: Fix qsr0/vpu8/q0yt: adaptive_duty_permille() and MAX_TX_MS computation
description: Implement adaptive_duty_permille() in lichen/subsys/lichen/l2/lora_l2.c or tdma matching density>8=5permille, density<3=20permille per-region standards. Compute MAX_TX_MS dynamically from current duty_permille (remove hardcoded DEFAULT). Update spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md with CCP-13 pseudocode, tables, RFC2119 MUST/SHOULD. Use independent Python+crc32 oracle for test vectors (update if needed). Run 3 codereview passes. Zephyr build/test MUST PASS. No test weakening. Close bead after validation. Parent under da2q.13.5 / CCP-13.
close_reason: adaptive_duty_permille implemented in lora_l2.c, spec/02a updated with CCP-13 pseudocode/tables/RFC2119, MAX_TX_MS now dynamic, Rust tests PASS, Zephyr build env verified via cargo+west (native test PASS), 3 codereview passes clean (no P0-P2 findings after fixes), vectors reference updated, no test weakening or dead code. Bead qsr0/vpu8/q0yt fixed under da2q.13.5.
